description: Style Note This T-shirt from quiksilver is perfect for the cosmopolitan male who's fixated on the minimal mood of the moment. The tee is an off-duty essential in every man's wardrobe, wear it with denims or shorts and a jacket for a coffee date. Style with casual shoes and an understated belt. Product Details Grey T-shirt with long sleeves, has a round neckline and graphic print in front Material and Care 100% cotton Wash and iron inside out Do not bleach or tumble dry Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
